title: No Jump Delay
description: No Jump Delay removes the built-in delay between jumps when holding the jump key.
body:
No Jump Delay removes the built-in delay between jumps when holding the jump key.

When holding the spacebar, the player will automatically jump immediately upon touching the ground, making movement smoother and more responsive.

Features:
- Removes vanilla jump cooldown
- Works by holding the jump key
- Client-side only
- Lightweight and simple

Note:
This mod only affects jump timing and does not modify other gameplay mechanics.
May not work correctly on servers with anti-cheat systems.
